name: CTA Abdominal Aorta
description: CT angiography of the abdominal aorta for aneurysm and stenosis evaluation

findings.technique: CT angiography of the abdomen was performed following intravenous contrast.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Abdominal Aorta
sections.content: Abdominal aorta [no aneurysm / no dilatation / normal caliber]. No dissection.

sections.name: Renal Arteries
sections.content: Renal arteries [are patent / no stenosis / no fibromuscular dysplasia] bilaterally.

sections.name: Iliac Arteries
sections.content: Common iliac arteries [are patent / no stenosis / no aneurysm] bilaterally.

impression:
1. No abdominal aortic aneurysm.
2. No renal artery stenosis.
3. Normal abdominal vascular CTA.
